title: Garlicky Silky Dutch Marzipan Fritters
description: A comforting Dutch-inspired fritter that marries garlicky almond batter with a silky honey-garlic glaze for a satisfying snack.

ingredients.name: honey
ingredients.amount: 1/4 cup (60 ml) for batter plus 1 tbsp (15 g) for glaze

instructions: Whisk the honey, eggs, minced garlic, almond paste, coconut milk, and sea salt together until smooth.
Sift the almond flour into a separate bowl and gradually fold it into the wet mixture until a thick batter forms.
Heat 1 tbsp of coconut oil in a non‑stick skillet over medium heat; add the remaining 1 tbsp oil to the pan before adding batter.
Drop heaping teaspoonfuls of batter into the hot oil, spacing them 2 inches apart.
Fry each fritter for about 3–4 minutes on each side, or until golden brown and firm.
Using a slotted spoon, transfer fritters to a paper‑towel lined plate to drain excess oil.
While the fritters cook, combine the glaze honey, pressed garlic, and chili flakes in a small bowl; whisk until blended.
Drizzle the glaze over the hot fritters or serve it on the side for dipping.
Repeat with remaining batter, adding more oil as needed.
Serve warm, optionally topped with a sprinkle of sea salt or fresh herbs.
